examples: Government scientists have succeeded in isolating from mouse leukemia tissue another agent which has produced salivary gland cancers in mice.
Please investigate the surface adhesins of Bacteroides forsythus which interact with human salivary proline-rich proteins.
The virus eventually gets into the mosquito's salivary glands.
After a year of chemo he beat the cancer but lost his salivary glands.
Later, their progeny will head back into the mosquito's salivary glands and infect its next victim.
